name: CheckStrategy

name: ConnectionQuality
desc: Represents the perceived quality of the network connection based on latency and stability.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: NetworkConfiguration
desc: The main configuration object for the network reachability engine.

name: cacheValidityMs
desc: The duration (in milliseconds) for which a network report is cached.

name: checkIntervalMs
desc: The interval in milliseconds between automatic periodic checks.

name: default_
desc: Creates a production-ready default configuration.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: newInstance
desc: Creates a new NetworkConfiguration instance.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: qualityThreshold
desc: Custom latency thresholds for determining connection quality.

name: resilience
desc: Resilience settings including circuit breakers and jitter analysis.

name: security
desc: Security-specific settings such as VPN and DNS hijacking detection.

name: targets
desc: A list of network endpoints (NetworkTarget) to be monitored.

name: QualityThresholds
desc: Defines the latency thresholds (in milliseconds) used to determine ConnectionQuality.

name: default_
desc: Provides sensible default latency thresholds for most mobile and web applications.

name: excellent
desc: Latency at or below this value is considered ConnectionQuality::Excellent.

name: good
desc: Latency at or below this value is considered ConnectionQuality::Good.

name: great
desc: Latency at or below this value is considered ConnectionQuality::Great.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: moderate
desc: Latency at or below this value is considered ConnectionQuality::Moderate.

name: newInstance
desc: Creates a new QualityThresholds instance.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: poor
desc:
Latency at or below this value is considered ConnectionQuality::Poor.
Anything higher is categorized as ConnectionQuality::Unstable or ConnectionQuality::Poor.

name: ResilienceConfig
desc: Configuration for resilience, stability analysis, and performance tuning.

name: circuitBreakerCooldownMs
desc: The cooldown period in milliseconds.

name: circuitBreakerThreshold
desc:
The number of consecutive failures of essential targets before the
circuit breaker opens.

name: criticalPacketLossPrecent
desc: The packet loss percentage above which the connection is marked as ConnectionQuality::Unstable.

name: default_
desc: Provides a standard resilience configuration balanced for stability and speed.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: jitterThresholdPercent
desc:
The percentage of mean latency that the standard deviation must exceed
to be flagged as high jitter.

name: newInstance
desc: Creates a new ResilienceConfig instance.

name: numJitterSamples
desc: Number of samples to take for jitter and stability analysis.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: stabilityThershold
desc: The minimum stability score (0-100) required to avoid the 'Unstable' quality tag.

name: strategy
desc: The evaluation strategy to use when checking multiple targets.

name: SecurityConfig
desc: Configuration for security-related network checks.

name: blockVpn
desc: If true, the reachability engine will flag or block connections if a VPN is detected.

name: detectDnsHijack
desc: If true, performs a check to detect potential DNS hijacking.

name: CaptivePortalStatus

desc: The equality operator.

name: redirectUrl
desc: The destination URL of the redirection, if available.

name: ConnectionType

desc: Returns ConnectionType::Unknown as the fallback default.

desc: The system-assigned name of the active network interface (e.g., 'en0', 'wlan0').

name: isDnsSpoofed
desc: True if DNS results differ significantly from trusted resolvers, suggesting tampering.

name: isProxyDetected
desc: True if a system-level HTTP/HTTPS proxy is detected.

desc: True if the active interface is identified as a VPN or tunnel (e.g., 'tun0', 'utun').

desc: Thrown by the guard method when the circuit breaker is open due to repeated backend failures.

desc: The duration to wait before attempting another request.

name: detectDnsHijacking

desc: Automatically manages periodic checks based on the Flutter app lifecycle.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes of the engine, removes lifecycle observers, and closes streams.

name: guard
desc: A wrapper to protect network-dependent operations (e.g., API calls).

name: init
desc: Initializes the network reachability engine.

name: instance
desc: The singleton instance of the network reachability engine.

desc: A stream of NetworkStatus updates emitted during periodic checks.

desc: Base class for all network reachability exceptions.

name: message
desc: The message associated with this exception.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

desc: Extension on NetworkReport to provide an immutable way to copy the report.

desc: Creates a copy of NetworkReport by modifying fields on the opaque pointer.

name: NetworkStatusCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkStatus to provide an immutable way to copy the status summary.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of NetworkStatus with the given fields replaced by the new values.

name: NetworkTargetCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkTarget to provide an immutable way to copy the target definition.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of NetworkTarget with the given fields replaced by the new values.

name: NetworkTimeoutException
desc: Thrown when a network check operation times out.

name: NetworkTimeoutException.new
desc: Creates a new NetworkTimeoutException with the given message.

name: PoorConnectionException
desc: Thrown by the guard method when the connection quality is below the required minimum.

name: PoorConnectionException.new
desc: Creates a new PoorConnectionException with the given message.

name: QualityThresholdsCopyWith
desc: Extension on QualityThresholds to provide an immutable way to copy the config.

name: copyWith

name: SecurityAlert
desc: Enum representing specific security alerts or policy violations.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SecurityConfigCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityConfig to provide an immutable way to copy the config.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of SecurityConfig with the given fields replaced by the new values.

name: SecurityException
desc: Thrown by the guard method when a security requirement is not met (e.g., VPN detected).

name: SecurityException.new
desc: Creates a new SecurityException with the given reason and message.

name: reason
desc: The reason this exception was thrown.

name: SecurityFlagsCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityFlags to provide an immutable way to copy the flags.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of SecurityFlags with the given fields replaced by the new values.

name: SecurityFlagsResultCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityFlagsResult to provide an immutable way to copy the result.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of SecurityFlagsResult by modifying fields on the opaque pointer.

name: TargetReportCopyWith
desc: Extension on TargetReport to provide an immutable way to copy the report for a single target.

desc: Creates a copy of TargetReport with the given fields replaced by the new values.

name: evaluateNetworkQuality
desc: Evaluates the final network quality by combining speed, stability, and loss.

name: evaluateQuality
desc: Evaluates connection quality based on a latency value and a set of thresholds.

name: LatencyStats
desc: A suite of statistical metrics derived from multiple latency samples.

name: avgLatencyMs
desc: The arithmetic mean of all successful latency samples.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: jitterMs
desc: The standard deviation of latency samples, measuring "jitter".

name: latencyMs
desc: The representative latency value for this report (usually the mean or median of samples).

name: maxLatencyMs
desc: The highest latency recorded across all samples.

name: minLatencyMs
desc: The lowest latency recorded across all samples.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: packetLossPercent
desc: The percentage of samples that failed to return a response.

name: stabilityScore
desc: A composite score from 0 (broken) to 100 (perfect) representing overall stability.

name: NetworkStatus
desc: A high-level summary of the network's current state.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isConnected
desc: True if the network is considered "connected" based on the CheckStrategy.

name: latencyStats
desc: Detailed statistical breakdown of the connection's performance.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: quality
desc: The categorical quality of the connection (e.g., Excellent, Poor, Offline).

name: winnerTarget
desc: The label of the target that provided the fastest response in this check cycle.

name: TargetReport
desc: Detailed outcome of a connectivity check against a specific NetworkTarget.

name: error
desc: A descriptive error message if the check failed.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isEssential
desc: Whether this target was marked as essential for the overall network status.

name: label
desc: The unique label identifying the target.

name: latencyMs
desc: The measured latency in milliseconds.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: success
desc: Indicates whether the target was successfully reached using the specified protocol.

name: analyzeSingleSample
desc: Analyzes the results of a single sample run across all targets.

name: collectNetworkSamples
desc: Collects multiple latency samples by running checks against all configured targets.

name: performDnsSecurityCheck
desc: Runs the DNS hijack check by comparing resolution against trusted resolvers.

name: calculateJitterStats
desc: Calculates statistical metrics for a series of latency samples.

name: computeLatencyStats
desc: Computes final latency and stability statistics from a set of samples.

name: NetworkTarget
desc: Configuration for a specific network endpoint to be monitored.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: host
desc: The remote address to check. Can be a domain name (google.com) or an IP address (8.8.8.8).

name: isEssential
desc: If true, a failure of this specific target is considered a critical event.

name: label
desc: A human-readable identifier for the target (e.g., "Primary DNS", "API Gateway").

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: port
desc: The destination port for the check (e.g., 80 for HTTP, 443 for HTTPS, 53 for DNS).

name: priority
desc: The relative priority of this target (lower numbers = higher priority).

name: protocol
desc: The network protocol to use for the probe.

name: timeoutMs
desc: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a response before timing out.

name: TargetProtocol
desc: Supported protocols for network reachability checks.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: checkTarget
desc: Performs a network check against a single, specified target.
